name: Logon Session Metadata
description: Contextual data about a logon session, such as username, logon type, access tokens (security context, user SIDs, logon identifiers, and logon SID), and any activity associated within it. This data represents the state of an active session and the privileges available to it.

sysinternals.description: Lists the currently active logon sessions and, if specified, the processes running in each session.

native_commands.description: Displays information about user sessions on a Remote Desktop Session Host server.
Displays the current user's security identifier (SID), group memberships, and privileges (token metadata).

powershell.description: Retrieves the configuration of the logon session (LogonID, StartTime, LogonType).

event_logs.description: Logon Success; contains the initial snapshot of session metadata (Logon GUID, Logon ID, Token Elevation Type).

systemd.description: List current sessions managed by systemd-logind.

commands.description: Show who is logged on and what they are doing.
Show listing of last logged in users.

files.description: File containing the current status of the system (who is currently logged in).

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: ssh logins or execve of remote commands

log_sources.Name: azure:audit
log_sources.Channel: Add delegated admin / Assign admin roles / Update application consent

log_sources.Name: azure:signinlogs
log_sources.Channel: SAML-based login with anomalous issuer or NotOnOrAfter lifetime

log_sources.Name: kubernetes:audit
log_sources.Channel: Unauthorized container creation or kubelet exec logs

log_sources.Name: m365:unified
log_sources.Channel: Abnormal user claims or unexpected elevated role assignment in SAML assertion

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: LoginWindow context with associated PID linked to reopened plist paths

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: authd generating multiple MFA token requests

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: Remote login (ssh) or screen sharing authentication attempts

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: Group membership change for admin or wheel

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: Unusual Kerberos TGS-REQ without TGT or anomalous ticket lifetime

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: loginwindow or sshd events with external IP

log_sources.Name: NSM:Connections
log_sources.Channel: Successful sudo or ssh from unknown IPs

log_sources.Name: saas:salesforce
log_sources.Channel: ConnectedApp OAuth policy change / Login as user
